title: The Richest Man in Babylon
author: George S. Clason
subline: The golden rules of wealth — written in 1926, still true.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A ziggurat / stepped pyramid (Babylonian temple). 5 levels, each a rectangle stacked. The peak is RED — the gold. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Level 1 (widest) -->
    <rect x="-460" y="280" width="920" height="120"/>
    <!-- Level 2 -->
    <rect x="-360" y="160" width="720" height="120"/>
    <!-- Level 3 -->
    <rect x="-260" y="40" width="520" height="120"/>
    <!-- Level 4 -->
    <rect x="-160" y="-80" width="320" height="120"/>
    <!-- Level 5 (narrowest) -->
    <rect x="-60" y="-200" width="120" height="120"/>
    <!-- Stairs climbing up the front -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
      <line x1="-30" y1="400" x2="-30" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="400" x2="0" y2="-200"/>
      <line x1="30" y1="400" x2="30" y2="-200"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The peak: a small red pyramid -->
    <path d="M -60 -200 L 0 -280 L 60 -200 Z" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Foundation rule -->
    <line x1="-540" y1="400" x2="540" y2="400" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">PAY YOURSELF FIRST</text>
</svg>
rationale: A 5-level ziggurat (Babylonian stepped temple) in hairline ash, with three vertical stairs climbing the front. The peak — the topmost temple — is a red filled triangle. The composition reads as a temple to gold, and the red tip is the gold itself. Title 280px uppercase, two lines. The cover is the architecture of wealth, ancient style.
